title: Edho Oru Paatu(Male) Song Lyrics Unnidathil Ennai Koduthen
stanzas:
Edho Oru Paatu(Male) Song Lyrics Unnidathil Ennai Koduthen
#SARajkumar #Hariharan

Yedho oru paattu
en kadhil kaetkum
kaetkum podhellaam
un niyabagam thaalaattum (2)

en kangalin imaigalile
un niyabagam siragadikkum
naan swasikkum moochinile
un niyabagam kalandhirukkum
mmmmm....

niyabagangal mazhaiyaagum
niyabagangal kudaiyaagum
niyabagangal theemoottum
niyabagangal neer ootrum

Yedho oru paattu
en kadhil kaetkum
kaetkum podhellaam
un niyabagam thaalaattum

Kavidhai endrale
un peyarin niyabagame.
kaetkum isai ellaam
nee pesum niyabagame

adhirstam endrathum
undhan machcham niyabagam
azhagu endradhum
undhan moththam niyabagam

thendral endraale
un vaasal niyabagame
vasantham endraale
un varugai niyabagame

alaigal polave modhum
undhan niyabagam
marandhu ponadhe enakku
endhan niyabagam

Yedho oru paattu
en kadhil kaetkum
kaetkum podhellaam
un niyabagam thaalaattum (2)

en kangalin imaigalile
un niyabagam siragadikkum
naan swasikkum moochinile
un niyabagam kalandhirukkum
mmmmm....

niyabagangal mazhaiyaagum
niyabagangal kudaiyaagum
niyabagangal theemoottum
niyabagangal neer ootrum

Yedho oru paattu
en kadhil kaetkum
kaetkum podhellaam
un niyabagam thaalaattum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and nostalgia, reflecting on cherished memories associated with a loved one.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Unnidathil Ennai Koduthen, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's feelings of love and longing.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Hariharan and composed by S.A. Rajkumar.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 14, 1998.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Edho Oru Paatu(Male), the listener is taken on a journey through the emotions of love and nostalgia. The song beautifully conveys the protagonist's reflections on cherished memories with a loved one, evoking a sense of longing and warmth. With Hariharan's captivating vocals, the melody resonates deeply, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. This heartfelt composition by S.A. Rajkumar enhances the emotional depth of the film, leaving a lasting impression on the audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Edho Oru Paatu(Male) from the film Unnidathil Ennai Koduthen is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Hariharan's soulful voice and S.A. Rajkumar's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the beauty of romance. Dive into this nostalgic tune that beautifully expresses the emotions of cherished memories and heartfelt connections.
stanzaMeanings: There is a song that echoes in my heart, every time I hear it, it reminds me of you.
In my eyes, your memory dances, and in my breath, your memory blends together.
Memories fall like rain, memories become umbrellas, memories create storms, memories flow like water.
There is a song that echoes in my heart, every time I hear it, it reminds me of you.
If poetry means anything, it is your name that comes to mind. Every song I hear is your memory speaking.
If I see the dew on the flowers, it reminds me of your face.
Your luck is called destiny, your beauty is called your entirety.
When the breeze blows, it reminds me of your entrance, when spring comes, it reminds me of your arrival.
When I see the waves, it reminds me of your absence.
Like the waves, your memory has not faded away, my memory is still with me.
There is a song that echoes in my heart, every time I hear it, it reminds me of you.
In my eyes, your memory dances, and in my breath, your memory blends together.
Memories fall like rain, memories become umbrellas, memories create storms, memories flow like water.
There is a song that echoes in my heart, every time I hear it, it reminds me of you.
